description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image for the default jobs and defining three stages: test, build, and release. Add a format job in the test stage that runs `diff <(echo -n) <(gofmt -s -d .)` to check Go formatting. Add a compile job in the build stage that runs `bash $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/build.sh pin $CI_PROJECT_DIR` and stores the resulting files as artifacts from the `artifacts/` directory. Add a docker job in the release stage that uses the docker:19.03.12 image with the docker:19.03.12-dind service, defines an IMAGE_TAG variable as `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG`, logs in to the registry with `docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY`, builds the image with `docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG .`, tags it as latest with `docker tag $IMAGE_TAG $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`, and pushes both tags with `docker push $IMAGE_TAG` and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`.
